description: Unified schedule manifest — configuration template for all scheduled jobs and daemons, synced to Cronicle via seed_jobs.py

jobs.name: ws-observation-gate-dream
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-observation-gate-dream
jobs.description: 一次性: 2026-04-15 18:00 — Dream consolidation 觀察期結束，Bark 通知檢查結果

jobs.name: ws-memvault-synthesis
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-memvault-synthesis
jobs.description: 每日 17:30: Leiden communities → LLM summaries → Qdrant indexing → decay → attitude（晚餐時段執行）

jobs.name: ws-session-archive
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-session-archive
jobs.description: 每日 5:45AM: session lifecycle pipeline — redact sweep → scan → archive (hook 失效備援，錯峰執行)

jobs.name: ws-session-cleanup
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-session-cleanup
jobs.description: 每週日 4AM: 清除 trivial sessions (age > 7d, size < 3KB or quality_score < 0.15)

jobs.name: daily-briefing
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.daily-briefing
jobs.description: 每日情報簡報：金融、AI、科技、地緣政治（7:00 AM）⚡quota-gate

jobs.name: dotfiles-sync
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.dotfiles-sync
jobs.description: [已停用] 舊版 dotfiles 同步 — 已被 ws-envkit-snapshot 取代

jobs.name: ws-envkit-snapshot
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-envkit-snapshot
jobs.description: 每週一 5:30AM: 環境快照 + config 備份 + drift 偵測

jobs.name: disk-report
jobs.label: com.joneshong.disk-report
jobs.description: [已停用] 舊版每日磁碟報告 — 已合併至 system-monitor

jobs.name: ws-sysmon-weekly
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-sysmon-weekly
jobs.description: 每週一 17:30: 系統監控週報（磁碟+硬體+AI 建議）⚡quota-gate（晚餐時段執行）

jobs.name: ws-sysmon-monthly
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-sysmon-monthly
jobs.description: 每月 1 日 17:30: 系統監控月報（深度分析+容量規劃）⚡quota-gate（晚餐時段執行）

jobs.name: blink-reinstall
jobs.label: com.joneshong.blink-reinstall
jobs.description: 每 3 天自動重裝 Blink Shell（GPL build）

jobs.name: auth-service
jobs.label: com.joneshong.auth-service
jobs.description: OpenClaw Auth Service（KeepAlive daemon）

jobs.name: orchestrator
jobs.label: com.joneshong.orchestrator
jobs.description: [已停用] 已遷移至 stations/agent-metrics（由 workshop-services.sh 管理）

jobs.name: tmux-webui
jobs.label: com.joneshong.tmux-webui
jobs.description: tmux Web UI — WebSocket bridge（KeepAlive daemon, port 8765）

jobs.name: workshop-launcher
jobs.label: com.workshop.launcher
jobs.description: Workshop 服務啟動器（KeepAlive daemon, Core API + Redis）

jobs.name: ws-drift-check
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-drift-check
jobs.description: 每週一 6AM: 系統狀態漂移偵測（baseline diff → stdout log）

jobs.name: ws-auto-survey-wed
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-auto-survey-wed
jobs.description: 每週三 13:00: LINE OCR 自動抓連結 → auto-survey pipeline → Bark fallback

jobs.name: ws-auto-survey-fri
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-auto-survey-fri
jobs.description: 每週五 13:00: LINE OCR 自動抓連結 → auto-survey pipeline → Bark fallback

jobs.name: ws-auto-survey-rs-start-wed
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-auto-survey-rs-start-wed
jobs.description: 週三 10:00 啟動 auto-survey-rs（按需服務，Rust 版）

jobs.name: ws-auto-survey-rs-start-fri
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-auto-survey-rs-start-fri
jobs.description: 週五 10:00 啟動 auto-survey-rs（按需服務，Rust 版）

jobs.name: ws-auto-survey-rs-stop-wed
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-auto-survey-rs-stop-wed
jobs.description: 週三 18:00 關閉 auto-survey-rs

jobs.name: ws-auto-survey-rs-stop-fri
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-auto-survey-rs-stop-fri
jobs.description: 週五 18:00 關閉 auto-survey-rs

jobs.name: ws-finance-billing
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-finance-billing

jobs.name: ws-finance-monthly-snapshot
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-finance-monthly-snapshot
jobs.description: 每月 1 日 00:30: 全域錢包快照存檔（RPG 式資產備份）

jobs.name: ws-capture-expire
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-capture-expire
jobs.description: 每日 3AM: 過期 stale captures（超過 expires_at 的待處理項目）

jobs.name: ws-skill-lifecycle
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-skill-lifecycle
jobs.description: 每週日 17:00: skill lifecycle — test + security + catalog → Anvil DB（晚餐時段執行）

jobs.name: ws-cannibalization-drift
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-cannibalization-drift
jobs.description: 每週一 6:30AM: 蠶食來源上游漂移偵測（GitHub API diff → Bark 通知）

jobs.name: ws-dashscope-quota-sync
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-dashscope-quota-sync
jobs.description: 每日 18:30: DashScope (Qwen) 免費額度爬取同步 → Redis（錯開 Playwright jobs 防 GPU 競爭）

jobs.name: ws-provider-balance-sync
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-provider-balance-sync
jobs.description: 每日 18:15: LLM 供應商餘額爬取同步 → Redis（錯開 memvault synthesis 防 GPU 競爭）

jobs.name: ws-model-catalog-sync
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-model-catalog-sync
jobs.description: 每週一 19:00: 爬 Arena 排行榜，推薦未設定的高排名模型（排除御三家+已設定）→ Redis

jobs.name: ws-model-freshness-scan
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-model-freshness-scan
jobs.description: 每週日 16:30: LLM provider model freshness scan — API 查 7 家供應商 → 比對 config.yaml → Bark 通知

jobs.name: ws-relay-auto-standby
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-relay-auto-standby
jobs.description: 每 2 分鐘: idle relay pane auto-standby（主窗口保留 shell，副窗口直接 kill）

jobs.name: ws-relay-reaper
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-relay-reaper
jobs.description: 每 5 分鐘: relay reaper — 清理 bare shell panes + 空窗口（不碰主窗口）

jobs.name: ws-memory-guardian
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-memory-guardian
jobs.description: 每 60 秒: 記憶體壓力防護 — P1 殺可犧牲 app, P2/P3 殺 Claude Code

jobs.name: ws-capture-watchdog
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-capture-watchdog
jobs.description: 每 5 分鐘: Capture Haiku 常駐 watchdog — idle >30min 自動 recycle

jobs.name: ws-memvault-lint
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-memvault-lint
jobs.description: 每週日 3:30AM: Knowledge Lint — contradictions, stale, orphans, anomalies, gaps

jobs.name: ws-memvault-dream
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-memvault-dream
jobs.description: 每日 4AM: Dream Loop — 矛盾解決 + batch dedup + 日期正規化 + prune（雙閘門自動跳過）

jobs.name: ws-paper-digest
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-paper-digest
jobs.description: 每日 6:30AM: arXiv 論文抓取 → 去重 → 相關度評分 → Haiku digest → 蠶食候選標記；週一加跑 weekly rollup

jobs.name: ws-drift-detection
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-drift-detection
jobs.description: 每日 17:00: DailyOS goal drift 偵測 + 通知

jobs.name: ws-memvault-extract-batch
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-memvault-extract-batch
jobs.description: 每日 3AM: Memvault batch extraction + re-embedding

jobs.name: ws-intelligence-digest
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-intelligence-digest
jobs.description: 每週一 9AM: 情報彙整 + memvault flywheel

jobs.name: ws-intelflow-grc
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-intelflow-grc
jobs.description: 每週日 5AM: Intelflow G-R-C reflect + curate

jobs.name: ws-memvault-grc
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-memvault-grc
jobs.description: 每週日 5:30AM: Memvault G-R-C reflect + curate（錯開 intelflow 5AM、anvil 6AM）

jobs.name: ws-anvil-grc
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-anvil-grc

jobs.name: ws-routing-training-export
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-routing-training-export

jobs.name: ws-nginx-autoban
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-nginx-autoban
jobs.description: 每 5 分鐘: Nginx 429 auto-ban — 超過閾值 IP 加入 blocklist + reload

jobs.name: ws-sentinel-check
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-sentinel-check
jobs.description: 每 5 分鐘: light health check — HTTP probe all services → sentinel DB + Bark on failure

jobs.name: ws-db-backup-gdrive
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-db-backup-gdrive
jobs.description: 每日 4:30AM: PostgreSQL full backup → gzip → Google Drive (keep 4 versions)

jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-blog-translate
